---
title: "HTML widgets"
description: "Test spacing and rendering for HTML widgets."
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Widgets

Test spacing above the widget.

```{r}
#| echo: false
path1 <- tempfile()
writeLines(letters, path1)
path2 <- tempfile()
writeLines(letters[-(10:11)], path2)

diffviewer::visual_diff(path1, path2)
```

Test spacing below the widget.
